## Type

## Checklist

- [ ] Follows the conventions in [`CLAUDE.md`](../CLAUDE.md) / [`DESIGN.md`](../DESIGN.md) (tokens, no `any`, light/dark equal).
- [ ] New/changed components implement **both** representations (render **and** MCP/knowledge face).
- [ ] Added or updated a Storybook story / example where relevant.
- [ ] Self-reviewed; no leftover debug code or hardcoded paths.
